case_title: MOHAN ROY NAIR VS. CIARA BAUTISTA

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAIR, MOHAN ROY AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, CIARA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
